recommendations.title: Portrait of Jennie
recommendations.overview: A mysterious girl inspires a struggling artist.

recommendations.title: An Officer and a Spy
recommendations.overview: In 1894, French Captain Alfred Dreyfus is wrongfully convicted of treason and sentenced to life imprisonment at the Devil’s Island penal colony.

recommendations.title: Faust
recommendations.overview: God and Satan wager on the soul of a learned and prayerful alchemist as part of their eternal war over Earth.

recommendations.title: The Act of Killing

recommendations.title: Promise at Dawn

recommendations.title: Making a Living
recommendations.overview: A swindler scams a newspaper reporter-photographer and then, not realizing where the man is employed, applies for a job at his newspaper.

recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.
